overall.description: A slow panoramic rotation through a gothic-style wizarding dormitory with green velvet canopies and stone architecture, likely from a Harry Potter video game. The camera pans around a central ornate stove, revealing four-poster beds, wooden furniture, and tapestries in a dimly lit, atmospheric underground chamber.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic dormitory chamber with four-poster beds

agents.ego_description: slowly panning clockwise to survey the left side of the dormitory room

entered.detail: tall decorative iron stove with glowing embers inside, moss-covered top
dark wood four-poster bed with green velvet curtains and canopy
pointed gothic stone archways forming the ceiling structure
large wall hanging depicting a forest scene with green tones
medieval-style wall-mounted lamp with warm yellow light
dark wooden trunk with metal straps at the foot of the bed

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a gothic dormitory interior with a central ornate iron stove glowing with embers. To the left stands a four-poster bed with green velvet curtains, while the background features stone archways and a forest tapestry. The camera slowly pans clockwise, maintaining focus on the stove while revealing wall sconces and wooden storage chests.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic dormitory chamber with wooden door and wardrobe

agents.ego_description: continuing to pan clockwise, now focusing on the right side of the room

entered.detail: matching four-poster bed with green curtains on the right side of the chamber
heavy dark wooden door with metal studs set in a stone archway
tall dark wooden wardrobe cabinet with carved details
circular patterned rug on the stone floor near the beds

segments.scene_description: As the camera continues its clockwise pan, the left bed exits the frame and the right side of the dormitory comes into view. A matching four-poster bed with green curtains appears on the right, along with a heavy wooden door in the background and a dark wooden wardrobe in the foreground. The central stove remains visible throughout the rotation.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic dormitory chamber completing the panoramic view

agents.ego_description: completing the panoramic rotation back toward the original starting position

entered.detail: the original four-poster bed with green curtains reappearing on the left
wall-mounted lamp visible again on the left wall

segments.scene_description: The final segment completes the 360-degree panoramic view as the camera rotates back to the starting position. The left bed with green curtains re-enters the frame while the right-side furniture exits. The central stove remains a constant focal point throughout the entire rotation, and the gothic stone architecture with its atmospheric green lighting remains consistent.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a slow, continuous clockwise rotation through a gothic dormitory, orbiting a central glowing stove to reveal the symmetrical layout of the atmospheric chamber. It begins focused on the ornate iron stove and a four-poster bed with green velvet curtains, while stone archways and a forest tapestry anchor the background. As the camera continues its pan, the first bed exits the frame to make way for a matching green-curtained bed on the right, accompanied by a heavy wooden door and a dark wardrobe. The rotation then completes its full circle, shifting the perspective back toward the original starting point as the right-side furniture disappears and the first bed re-enters the frame. Throughout the entire movement, the central stove remains a constant focal point amidst the consistent green lighting and stone architecture.
